case_for: Carr's recent trend shows improvement with three straight games above 12 points, including two strong performances of 18+ points in his last two outings, aligning with the pregame projection of 18.7 points.
case_against: Carr's season has been inconsistent with two early games well below the threshold (8.0 and 8.1 points), showing he's capable of significant floor-busting performances.
